query:
-- Sample of non-xero billing items to understand their source
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.invoiceDate, bi.contactName, bi.description, 
       bi.lineAmount, bi.accountCode, bi.category, bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform,
       bi.serviceExternalId,
       s.planName, s.supplierName, s.locationAddress
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.category = 'internet' AND bi.customerExternalId = 'C0159'
LIMIT 10;

-- Check what the 13 unassigned services in the screenshot are (from supplier services panel)
SELECT externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, supplierName, 
       monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, locationAddress, connectionId
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0159' AND (monthlyRevenue = 0 OR monthlyRevenue IS NULL)
ORDER BY serviceType, monthlyCost DESC;

SELECT bi.externalId, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.invoiceDate, bi.contactName, bi.description, 
       bi.lineAmount, bi.accountCode, bi.category, bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform,
       bi.serviceExternalId,
       s.planName, s.supplierName, s.locationAddress
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.category = 'internet' AND bi.customerExternalId = 'C0159'
LIMIT 10;

-- Check what the 13 unassigned services in the screenshot are (from supplier services panel)
SELECT externalId, serviceType, serviceTypeDetail, planName, supplierName, 
       monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, locationAddress, connectionId
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0159' AND (monthlyRevenue = 0 OR monthlyRevenue IS NULL)
ORDER BY serviceType, monthlyCost DESC;
